prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学为                        985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第8名，稳居全国前十，学校层次极高，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主                         要涉及校园安全与师德师风舆情事件；抖音热度排名第19（高热），短视频曝光量大；近年无投档断档记录，整体报考关注度仍处高位；第五轮学科评估中，法                        学A+、地球物理学A+、测绘科学与技术A+、马克思主义理论A+等共20个学科获评A-及以上，学科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 1738 → 3589 → 2617 → 2234 → 1489. In 2022, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination reform, there was a significant fluctuation. From 2023 to 2024, it gradually recovered, and in 2025, it moved sharply forward to 1489, an increase of about 745 places compared to 2024, indicating a notable rise in application popularity, with an obvious upward trend in the past two years. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Guizhou: 80 in 2021, 82 in 2022, 97 in 2023, 80 in 2024, 81 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 131, an expansion of about 61.7% compared to 2025, significantly increasing the number of admissions, which will greatly alleviate competition pressure and push the admission ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 8th, firmly among the top ten nationally, with an extremely high university level that continuously attracts students. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety and teacher ethics public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranks 19th (high heat), with high short video exposure. In recent years, there have been no records of enrollment gaps, and overall application attention remains high. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in Law, A+ in Geophysics, A+ in Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, A+ in Marxist Theory, and a total of 20 disciplines rated A- or above, with top-tier disciplinary strength that strongly attracts high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have social popularity ranging from hot to very hot. In 2026, the province's physics category examinees number approximately 208,400, a slight increase compared to 2025. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, a core central city, which has a strong regional appeal to Guizhou students. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou accounts for a small proportion, and even after expansion, it remains a small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound in 2025 rankings (increased popularity), the large expansion of 61.7% in 2026 (eased competition), the top-tier university level (continuous attraction), and the slight increase in provincial examinees, the expansion effect is the dominant force, but the strong rebound trend in 2025 partially offsets it. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be approximately 2000, with a range of 1772 to 2228.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1772), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>2228), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as a safety.

From 2021 to 2023, they stabilized in the 150–161 range, then significantly shifted backward to 226 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 222 in 2025, showing an overall backward trend in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Guizhou: 22 in 2021, 23 in 2022, 22 in 2023, 22 in 2024, 21 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 19, a reduction of about 9.5% compared to 2025. The decrease in enrollment slots will intensify competition, pushing rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, ranked 8th nationally by Soft Science, with an extremely high level, continuously attracting liberal arts candidates. 专业热度与地域.text: Law is divided in observation but still highly popular; Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. 预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend in recent rankings, the 9.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensified competition), the top-tier university level, and a slight increase in provincial candidates, the reduction effect and the backward trend basically offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be approximately 209, with a range of 109–309.
